policy.coverage_semantics: Soft floors trigger a second discovery pass; they never authorize fabricated or unsupported products.
policy.date_semantics: A product qualifies when an official launch, first listing, or first credible publication falls inside the target calendar month.

makeup.name: CN makeup launches
makeup.query: ("彩妆新品" OR "口红新品" OR "粉底新品" OR "气垫新品") (发布 OR 上市 OR 首发)

makeup.name: CN lip launches
makeup.query: (口红 OR 唇膏 OR 唇釉 OR 唇泥) (新品 OR 上市 OR 发布)

makeup.name: CN complexion launches
makeup.query: (粉底 OR 气垫 OR 遮瑕 OR 粉饼) (新品 OR 上市 OR 发布)

makeup.name: CN colour launches
makeup.query: (眼影 OR 腮红 OR 高光 OR 修容) (新品 OR 上市 OR 发布)

makeup.name: CN makeup brand launches
makeup.query: (花西子 OR 毛戈平 OR 珂拉琪 OR 橘朵 OR 卡姿兰 OR 完美日记) (彩妆新品 OR 新品上市 OR 新品发布)

makeup.name: CN makeup media launches
makeup.query: (site:vogue.com.cn OR site:ellechina.com OR site:jiemian.com) (彩妆新品 OR 口红新品 OR 粉底新品)

makeup.name: CN makeup social launches
makeup.query: site:weibo.com (彩妆新品 OR 口红新品 OR 气垫新品 OR 腮红新品)

fragrance.name: CN fragrance launches
fragrance.query: ("香水新品" OR "香氛新品") (发布 OR 上市 OR 首发) -香水椰 -香水柠檬

fragrance.name: CN scent launches
fragrance.query: (香水 OR 香氛 OR 淡香精 OR 浓香水) (新品上市 OR 新品发布 OR 全球首发) -饮料 -柠檬 -椰

fragrance.name: CN domestic fragrance launches
fragrance.query: (国货香水 OR 中国香水 OR 国产香氛) (新品 OR 上市 OR 发布)

fragrance.name: CN fragrance brand launches
fragrance.query: (观夏 OR 气味图书馆 OR 冰希黎 OR 闻献 OR DOCUMENTS OR 野兽派) (香水新品 OR 香氛新品 OR 新品上市)

fragrance.name: CN fragrance retail launches
fragrance.query: (天猫 OR 京东 OR 抖音) (香水新品 OR 香氛新品 OR 香水首发) -香水椰 -香水柠檬

fragrance.name: CN fragrance media launches
fragrance.query: (site:vogue.com.cn OR site:ellechina.com OR site:hypebeast.cn OR site:jiemian.com) (香水新品 OR 香氛新品)

fragrance.name: CN fragrance social launches
fragrance.query: site:weibo.com (香水新品 OR 香氛新品 OR 香水首发) -香水椰 -香水柠檬

fragrance.name: CN global fragrance launches
fragrance.query: (Dior OR Chanel OR Guerlain OR YSL OR Jo Malone OR Le Labo) (香水新品 OR 香水首发 OR 香氛新品) 中国

fragrance.name: CN monthly fragrance roundups
fragrance.query: 香水 新品 {year}年{month_number}月 -香水椰 -香水柠檬

evidence_grades.A: Official brand launch or product page with an exact in-window date.
evidence_grades.B: Retailer listing or reputable editorial source with an exact in-window publication date.
evidence_grades.C: Credible discovery or social-commerce source with an exact in-window first verified mention.
